blocks.text: UCL knockouts: Newcastle level at Camp Nou, Liverpool must rescue Anfield
After Chelsea's 0-3 collapse to PSG and City's defeat by Real Madrid last night, it's Liverpool's turn to answer. Galatasaray's 1-0 lead is far from insurmountable when Anfield rocks at full cry.
⚽ Sat 13:30 — Liverpool at Brighton, crucial points in the European race
⚽ Sun 13:00 — Sunderland vs Newcastle: the Tyne-Wear derby returns
